info.title: UnderTest.FeatureTransform
info.description: Feature transformation tool for gherkin feature files.

commands.name: excel
commands.description: Create excel workbook from feature files

options.name: --workingDirectory
options.description: Folder to execute this command in.  Defaults to the current directory.

arguments.name: FILEPATHS
arguments.description: Input filepath(s).  Supports globs, absolute and relative paths. [default: System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection`1[System.Reflection.CustomAttributeTypedArgument]]

commands.name: summary
commands.description: Create markdown summary page of features in project

options.name: --workingDirectory
options.description: Folder to execute this command in.  Defaults to the current directory.

arguments.name: FILEPATHS
arguments.description: Input filepath(s).  Supports globs, absolute and relative paths. [default: System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection`1[System.Reflection.CustomAttributeTypedArgument]]

options.name: --report
options.description: Input report file.  Supports Undertest reports [default: .\bin\Debug\netcoreapp2.2\reports\undertest-result.json]

options.name: --workingDirectory
options.description: Folder to execute this command in.  Defaults to the current directory.

arguments.name: FILEPATHS
arguments.description: Input filepath(s).  Supports globs, absolute and relative paths. [default: System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection`1[System.Reflection.CustomAttributeTypedArgument]]

commands.name: annotate
commands.description: Create annotated markdown versions of feature files.

options.name: --workingDirectory
options.description: Folder in which to execute this this command.  Defaults to the current directory.

arguments.name: FILEPATHS
arguments.description: Input filepath(s).  Supports globs, absolute and relative paths. [default: System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection`1[System.Reflection.CustomAttributeTypedArgument]]
